name: Trackingplan
description: Automatically detect what's affecting your digital analytics, maintain up-to-date tracking plans, and foster seamless collaboration with Trackingplan.
dataRetentionPolicy: Data retained for contract duration, deleted upon termination

expertReviews.summaryReport: Trackingplan provides automated data quality monitoring for analytics implementations. Data processing is fully EU-based via AWS Ireland. While they do not hold ISO 27001 or SOC 2 certifications directly, these are inherited from their infrastructure provider Amazon Web Services. Trackingplan applies anonymization techniques, encrypts data at rest and in transit, and has a comprehensive DPA covering all required clauses. All six core principles are verified.

transparency.notes: Clear documentation of data collection and processing practices. Privacy policy and DPA publicly available.

dataMinimization.notes: Processes only the analytics metadata necessary for data quality monitoring. Anonymization techniques applied.

accountability.notes: GDPR-compliant framework. Comprehensive DPA. ISO 27001 and SOC 2 inherited from AWS infrastructure. Business Continuity Plan and Data Breach Notification Procedures in place.

security.notes: Encryption at rest and in transit. Annual penetration testing. EU-only data processing via AWS Ireland. ISO 27001 and SOC 2 inherited from subprocessor.

quality.notes: EU data center ensures data sovereignty. Anonymization techniques ensure data quality without personal data dependency.

participation.notes: Supports DSARs. Designated DPO. Processes in place for data subject rights.
